title: quercus dentata var. yunnanensis
intro: Quercus dentata var. yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan cork oak, is a variant of the Quercus dentata tree species native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The bark and leaves of Quercus dentata var. yunnanensis are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often decocted or infused to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to harness the plant's medicinal properties.
